title: salvia clevelandii
intro: Salvia clevelandii, also known as Cleveland sage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Salvia clevelandii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Salvia clevelandii can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies, such as salves and tinctures.
